qas.a: Loyalty, Duty, Respect, Selfless Service, Honor, Integrity, Personal Courage.
Bear true faith and allegiance to the U.S. Constitution, the Army, and other Soldiers.
Treat people as they should be treated.
Put the welfare of the Nation, the Army, and your subordinates before your own.
Live up to the Army Values.
Do what's right, legally and morally.
Face fear, danger, or adversity (physically or moral)
